# MyAPI Documentation

> Complete documentation for the MyAPI platform

## Getting Started

- [Introduction](https://docs.myapi.com/docs/introduction): Overview of MyAPI and its core concepts
- [Installation](https://docs.myapi.com/docs/installation): How to install the MyAPI SDK
- [Quick Start](https://docs.myapi.com/docs/quick-start): Build your first integration in 5 minutes

## Authentication

- [API Keys](https://docs.myapi.com/docs/auth/api-keys): Managing and using API keys
- [OAuth 2.0](https://docs.myapi.com/docs/auth/oauth): Setting up OAuth 2.0 authentication

## API Reference

- [Users](https://docs.myapi.com/docs/api/users): User management endpoints
- [Projects](https://docs.myapi.com/docs/api/projects): Project CRUD operations
- [Webhooks](https://docs.myapi.com/docs/api/webhooks): Webhook configuration and events
